subcodes.first_line: O noble branch of the Blessed Tree! That which thou hadst written was read and recited [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فرع رفیع سدره مبارکه آنچه مرقوم فرموده بودید تلاوت و قرائت گردید و مکاتیب
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
